title: [MTR4] British Rail Class 67
description: Resource pack that adds the British Rail Class 67 into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
# Overview
![TFW](https://i.imgur.com/SGoVR9x.png)
The British Rail Class 67 is a type of Bo-Bo diesel-electric locomotive built between 1999 and 2000 by Alstom in Valencia, Spain, for English, Welsh & Scottish Railway (EWS). A total of 30 units were produced. Designed primarily for high-speed mail and passenger services, the Class 67 has a maximum speed of 125 mph (201 km/h), making it one of the fastest diesel locomotives in the UK.

Powered by a 3,200 hp (2,400 kW) EMD 12N-710G3B-EC engine, the Class 67 is fitted with a GM/EMD alternator and Siemens electrical equipment. Its robust design allows for both express passenger and heavy freight duties. Over time, the Class 67 fleet has been used for a wide variety of services, including hauling prestigious trains such as the Royal Train and acting as rescue locomotives for failed passenger units.

## BR Class 67 in Minecraft (MTR Mod)

This resource pack adds the BR Class 67 into Minecraft using the Minecraft Transit Railway mod. The original model was made by cw_315 for Transport Fever 2 and was ported to Minecraft by Vitor2005 in 2025. It is compatible with both MTR3 and MTR4.

## Included Liveries

- EWS (English, Welsh & Scottish Railway)

- DB Cargo UK

- Caledonian Sleeper

- Chiltern Railways

- Transport for Wales

# Disclaimer

This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, EWS, DB Cargo, Chiltern Railways, Colas Rail, Wrexham & Shropshire, Transport Fever 2, the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, or cw_315.
